goal: Stand up a first-pass 52,000 m² DC twin — 18 rack aisles, 6 conveyor loops, 4 dock doors — from existing Nucleus USD references, inside 30 minutes, with headroom for 64 AMRs later.
thoughts: Fatima is a DT architect — she references and clones facility assets, she does NOT import URDFs for racks. add_reference per asset family (rack, conveyor loop, dock door), then clone_envs for the 18-aisle grid on 2.8 m pitch. Flag prim-count budget UP FRONT so she can plan for the 64 AMRs + 200 conveyor segments. Confirm '18 x 3-bay' explicitly, don't guess.
code:
# 18 aisles, 6 loops, 4 docks. Confirm counts before cloning.

# 1. Browse the library (confirm the exact asset paths)
nucleus_browse(root="omniverse://ov-prod/Library/Logistics/")

# 2. Add one of each asset family as a template
add_reference(
    prim_path="/World/Racks/Template",
    reference_path="omniverse://ov-prod/Library/Logistics/pallet_rack_3bay.usd"
)
add_reference(
    prim_path="/World/Conveyors/Template",
    reference_path="omniverse://ov-prod/Library/Logistics/conveyor_loop_30m.usd"
)
add_reference(
    prim_path="/World/Docks/Template",
    reference_path="omniverse://ov-prod/Library/Logistics/dock_door.usd"
)

# 3. Clone to the 18-aisle grid (aisle pitch = 2.8 m on X; confirm before running)
clone_envs(
    source_prim="/World/Racks/Template",
    count=<18>,
    spacing=(<2.80>, 0.0, 0.0),           # X-pitch — correct to 2.85 if she says so
    destination_root="/World/Racks"
)
clone_envs(source_prim="/World/Conveyors/Template", count=6,  spacing=(<DX>,<DY>,0), destination_root="/World/Conveyors")
clone_envs(source_prim="/World/Docks/Template",     count=4,  spacing=(<DX>,0,0),    destination_root="/World/Docks")

# 4. Scale budget BEFORE she wires telemetry
check_vram_headroom(stage_path="<CURRENT_STAGE>")
run_stage_analysis(stage_path="<CURRENT_STAGE>")

# Tell Fatima: current prim count + projected count after 64 AMRs + 200 conveyor
# segments. If headroom is thin, flag it now — cheaper than discovering at AMR load.
failure_modes: Silently cloning 200 racks because she said 'a lot' without confirming 18 x 3-bay
Proposing URDF import for facility assets (racks are references, not robots)
Skipping check_vram_headroom and not flagging the 64-AMR scale budget up front
Hardcoding 2.8 m pitch and not accepting her correction to 2.85 m
